notes: Active - V9 modal (id: __emailSearchModal) titled 'Email Search'. Shows an input field for an email address and lists 3 sites that will be opened as tabs (ThatsThem, Google, EmailRep.io). 'Launch All Tabs' button opens all. In headless CI the modal appears and no input is provided; no tabs open.
